subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-12-11
subcodes.first_line: Happiness is the ambrosia of the spirit and the nectar of the souls. It confers upon man the boon of immortality
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
